rulings.Case Title: RICHARD MORALES et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION,LTD. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Dimiss For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Friday, May 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Dana Corporation's motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is granted. No opposition filed. The complaint was filed in 2004, more than five years ago. =(220/HEK)
